interface.shortDescription: Build deterministic funnel-stage reporting tables from CSV files.
interface.longDescription: Self-contained funnel-stage workflow for CSV datasets. It takes explicit ordered stage definitions, validates stage predicate columns, evaluates each gate sequentially, and writes a compact reporting table with starting population, passing population, drop-off, stage conversion, cumulative conversion, source CSV, context JSON, and artifact manifest. The scripts do not make direct model API calls.
defaultPrompt: Use Funnel Analysis on the CSV file I provide.

Confirm or build explicit ordered stage definitions, run the deterministic funnel-stage table package, write the table, context data and artifact manifest, then interpret the largest drop-offs from the source data.
